quizQuestion:
彼は漢字{___}、ひらがなも書けない。
(He cannot write even hiragana, let alone kanji.)
explanation: はおろか (let alone/not to mention) — 彼は漢字はおろか、ひらがなも書けない。Extreme case: even the simpler thing is impossible.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
旅行費用{___}、食費も出せない状況だ。
(The situation is such that I cannot even afford food, let alone travel expenses.)
explanation: はおろか (let alone) — 旅行費用はおろか、食費も出せない状況だ。Financial hardship expressed through escalation.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
外国語{___}、母国語の読み書きも苦手だ。
(Not to mention foreign languages, even reading and writing in his native language is difficult.)
explanation: はおろか (let alone) — 外国語はおろか、母国語の読み書きも苦手だ。Language ability extreme case.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
スマートフォン{___}、普通の携帯電話も使えない。
(Not to mention a smartphone, he cannot even use a regular mobile phone.)
explanation: はおろか (let alone) — スマートフォンはおろか、普通の携帯電話も使えない。Technology gap expressed.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
彼女は外見{___}、内面の美しさでも評判だ。
(Not only her appearance, but she is also praised for her inner beauty.)
explanation: もさることながら (not only but also/and above that) — 彼女は外見もさることながら、内面の美しさでも評判だ。Acknowledges A while emphasizing B.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
料理の美味しさ{___}、サービスの良さでも有名なレストランだ。
(Not only the delicious food, but the restaurant is also famous for its excellent service.)
explanation: もさることながら (not only but also) — 料理の美味しさもさることながら、サービスの良さでも有名なレストランだ。Restaurant praised on multiple fronts.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
知識{___}、経験の豊かさでも彼は評価されている。
(Not only his knowledge, but he is also evaluated for his wealth of experience.)
explanation: もさることながら (not only but also) — 知識もさることながら、経験の豊かさでも彼は評価されている。Multiple competencies recognized.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
価格の安さ{___}、品質の高さでも人気の商品だ。
(Not only the low price, but the product is also popular for its high quality.)
explanation: もさることながら (not only but also) — 価格の安さもさることながら、品質の高さでも人気の商品だ。Product praised for two positives.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
周囲の心配{___}、彼は毎日遊んでいる。
(Ignoring the worries of those around him, he plays every day.)
explanation: をよそに (ignoring/disregarding) — 周囲の心配をよそに、彼は毎日遊んでいる。Acting contrary to others' expectations or concerns.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
世間の批判{___}、彼女は自分の信念を貫いた。
(Ignoring the world's criticism, she stuck to her convictions.)
explanation: をよそに (ignoring/disregarding) — 世間の批判をよそに、彼女は自分の信念を貫いた。Conviction against public opinion.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
家族の反対{___}、彼は海外に移住した。
(Ignoring his family's opposition, he emigrated abroad.)
explanation: をよそに (ignoring) — 家族の反対をよそに、彼は海外に移住した。Personal decision against family wishes.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
社会の不安{___}、株価は上昇し続けた。
(Ignoring social unrest, stock prices continued to rise.)
explanation: をよそに (ignoring/disregarding) — 社会の不安をよそに、株価は上昇し続けた。Markets ignoring external conditions.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
{___}、早めに決断することが大切だ。
(In any case, it is important to make a decision early.)
explanation: いずれにしても (in any case/either way) — いずれにしても、早めに決断することが大切だ。Conclusion applies regardless of which scenario.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
{___}、結果は同じだったと思う。
(In any case, I think the result would have been the same.)
explanation: いずれにしても (in any case) — いずれにしても、結果は同じだったと思う。Resigned conclusion regardless of path.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
行くかどうかはともかく、{___}準備だけはしておこう。
(Whether or not we go, in any case let's at least prepare.)
explanation: いずれにしても (in any case) — いずれにしても準備だけはしておこう。Urging minimum action regardless of uncertainty.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
{___}、彼の努力は認めなければならない。
(In any case, we must acknowledge his effort.)
explanation: いずれにしても (in any case) — いずれにしても、彼の努力は認めなければならない。Conclusion holds regardless of judgment.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
彼の料理は全て美味しいが、{___}このスープが絶品だ。
(All his cooking is delicious, but this soup in particular is exceptional.)
explanation: とりわけ (especially/particularly) — 彼の料理は全て美味しいが、とりわけこのスープが絶品だ。Selects one item as the standout.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
今年の冬は寒いが、{___}今週は厳しい寒さだ。
(This winter is cold, but this week in particular is severely cold.)
explanation: とりわけ (especially/particularly) — 今年の冬は寒いが、とりわけ今週は厳しい寒さだ。Singling out a period for emphasis.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
子どもたちは皆元気だが、{___}下の子は活発だ。
(All the children are energetic, but the youngest in particular is especially lively.)
explanation: とりわけ (especially/particularly) — 子どもたちは皆元気だが、とりわけ下の子は活発だ。One child stands out.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
彼女はスポーツが得意だが、{___}水泳では無敵だ。
(She is good at sports, but she is unbeatable in swimming in particular.)
explanation: とりわけ (especially/particularly) — 彼女はスポーツが得意だが、とりわけ水泳では無敵だ。Specific sport singled out.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
彼の計画は{___}失敗に終わった。
(All of his plans ended in failure without exception.)
explanation: ことごとく (entirely/all/without exception) — 彼の計画はことごとく失敗に終わった。Every single item in a set failed.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
火事で家財道具が{___}焼けてしまった。
(All household belongings were burned in the fire without exception.)
explanation: ことごとく (entirely/all) — 火事で家財道具がことごとく焼けてしまった。Total loss context.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
提出した応募書類は{___}却下された。
(All submitted application documents were rejected without exception.)
explanation: ことごとく (entirely/all) — 提出した応募書類はことごとく却下された。Every application rejected.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion

quizQuestion:
彼女の予言は{___}的中した。
(All of her predictions came true without exception.)
explanation: ことごとく (entirely/all/without exception) — 彼女の予言はことごとく的中した。Every prediction proved accurate.
visualDescription: Japanese grammar study card with sentence completion
